_meta.description: Curated physical specifications reference database for BAFA-listed heat pump product families. Organized by manufacturer and product family. Each family has one or more chassis variants mapped to capacity ranges.
_meta.source_note: Dimensions and weights sourced from manufacturer technical datasheets and product documentation. Values represent the outdoor unit (ODU) for split systems and the main unit for monoblocks.
_meta.coverage_note: v2.0: Expanded from 34 to 49 families. Covers S/A+/A/B+ tiers plus major C/D tier Chinese OEM brands. Residential coverage: 72.6%.
